'''√dh-s-dh''' ('''dhasadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macarise|macarise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macarise|macarise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-s-dh
|-
! Lemma
| dhasadha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || dhasadhithi || dhasadhiji || dhasadhishi || dhasadhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || dhasadhuthuth || dhasadhujuj || dhasadhushush || dhasadh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || dhasadhuthu || dhasadhuju || dhasadhushu || dhasadhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || dhasadhufuth || dhasadhufuj || dhasadhufush || dhasadhuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dhasadhethe || dhasadheje || dhasadheshe || dhasadhe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || dhasadhothoth || dhasadhojoj || dhasadhoshosh || dhasadh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || dhasadhotho || dhasadhojo || dhasadhosho || dhasadho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || dhasadhofoth || dhasadhofoj || dhasadhofosh || dhasadhof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhasadhïf || dhasadhïf || dhasadhïf || dhasadhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhasadhïfïf || dhasadhïfïf || dhasadhïfïf || dhasadhïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhasadhïf || dhasadhïf || dhasadhïf || dhasadhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhasadhïf || dhasadhïf || dhasadhïf || dhasadhïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dhasadhæthæ || dhasadhæjæ || dhasadhæshæ || dhasadhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || dhasadhathath || dhasadhajaj || dhasadhashash || dhasadh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dhasadhatha || dhasadhaja || dhasadhasha || dhasadha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || dhasadhafath || dhasadhafaj || dhasadhafash || dhasadhaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || dhasadhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || godhasadhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokidhasadhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || dhasadhnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || godhasadhnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokidhasadhnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || dhasadhshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || godhasadhnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokidhasadhshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || dhasadhroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || godhasadhnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokidhasadhroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || dhasadhmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || godhasadhnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokidhasadhmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || dhasadhsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || godhasadhnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokidhasadhsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || dhasadhngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || godhasadhnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokidhasadhngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || dhasadhyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || godhasadhnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokidhasadhyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || dhasadhyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || godhasadhnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokidhasadhyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || dhasadhnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || godhasadhnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokidhasadhnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || dhasadhnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || godhasadhnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidhasadhnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || dhasadhnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || godhasadhnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokidhasadhnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || dhasadhshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || godhasadhnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokidhasadhshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || dhasadhshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || godhasadhnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidhasadhshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || dhasadhshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || godhasadhnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokidhasadhshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || dhasadhronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || godhasadhnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokidhasadhronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || dhasadhroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || godhasadhnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokidhasadhroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || dhasadhromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || godhasadhnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokidhasadhromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || dhasadhmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || godhasadhnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokidhasadhmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || dhasadhmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || godhasadhnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokidhasadhmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || dhasadhmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || godhasadhnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidhasadhmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || dhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || dhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hodhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hodhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohodhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohodhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüdhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüdhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïdhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïdhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || ludhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || ludhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luludhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luludhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lidhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lidhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilidhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilidhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kodhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kodhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokodhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokodhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kedhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kedhæsædh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekedhasadh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekedhæsædh
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
